reviews.review_title: Good game with high production values.
reviews.review_description:
Okay, it turned out to be a pretty solid horror title. I did get stuck at first which was quite frustrating, but it was my own darn fault for not understanding how each item worked. Hint: push the analogue stick. ;)

There were some bugs in chapters 2 & 3, but nothing major. Annoying at best. Overall though, what's on offer is a step above from your usual fare. I played on Quest 3 and visually it's up there with the best of them. Audio design is great too.

Give it a try if you want a few hours of horror goodness.

developer_response.body: There are no bugs in Chapter 2, but there is a sequence you need to perform in the ritual. Please reach out to us on discord or support at exorcist@funtrainvr.com so we can give you tips.

reviews.review_title: One of the best VR horror games
reviews.review_description: This is among the best and scariest VR horror games available. Atmosphere, story and immersion is all top notch! The only negative I used to have is I thought the ending was a little anticlimactic. However, with the addition of the Epilogue, that has been very much fixed!

developer_response.body: Thank you!  We're so glad you appreciated what we set out to do.  Thanks for playing our game.

reviews.review_title: Scary as hell, but flawed in gameplay.
reviews.review_description: First up, yeah, they have done a great job with the atmosphere of this game. The sound and environments will have you sweating and freaking out a bit, but the gameplay is flawed in places. Progression seems to rely to a degree on locational triggers, which don't always work. This often leaves you stuck until you give up and restart the level another day. And the exorcisms themselves go around indefinitely on loops until you figure out what vague action it is waiting for you perform with no clue as to what you are supposed to be doing. This all breaks the spell and reminds you that you are ultimately in a flawed game environment.

A realistic exorcist game, and a story that gave me
 a feeling of dread but compelled me to push on. Take your time and explore the environments. If demons are your thing this game is for you.

developer_response.body: Thanks, we're so glad you took the time with the game. There's lots to uncover.

reviews.review_description: Tried it for a couple hrs. Continually glitching lockin up black screen etc ect... You should be ashamed for charging money for a product so many have these problems with. Crooked to say the least.  just plain crap

developer_response.body: Hey dtknudson, please email exorcist@funtrainvr.com and we'll do our best to help resolve your technical difficulties!

reviews.review_description: This game NEEDS another darnn game connected and it has to be GOOD PLEASEE DEV READ THIS COMMENTT

developer_response.body: Things are changing with the game recently, and that might be a very real possibility in the future.  At least, an expansion.

reviews.review_description: the best scary game i found the other scary games that i found were really bad pretty good game

developer_response.body: Hey thank you Sledge!   Come by our discord and tell us what you want to see in the future.  Thanks for playing.

reviews.review_description:
I don't like using those expressions even for for a 
Game
This is easily one of the scariest games i have played. It doesn't rely on jumpscares...it makes you feel unsettled and uneasy with its atmosphere and sound design. Loved it

This game keeps me on the edge and makes me want to expect the unexpected but even with that level of preparation I am always in for a surprise. In all I truly do enjoy this game, the main reason why I started playing my oculus again.
I left its to scary

First of all, I am a big fan of the occult genre. Nothing gets my blood pumping more than a good scare. The chapters of this game were very well thought out, and the attention to detail is brilliant. The music and sound were terrifying. Graphics are also crystal clear.

Would have been cool, though, if the character could vocally exercise the demonic as well. Nevertheless, it does not affect my rating of the game. I found myself shouting at the demon, the power of Christ compels you! 


 I experienced no glitches playing Questst 2.

 If you are looking for a thrill this halloween, play this game! 

Thank you for a great game guys!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much.  We just updated the game with some quality of life changes, so check it out this Halloween!  Many thanks for your support, it means a lot.

reviews.review_description: A very pleasant, wonderful, and inspiring project. Thank you to the authors for letting me play it. I'm enjoying it. Great work.

developer_response.body: Thank you!

reviews.review_description: I wasn't expecting much from this game. However, it surprised me. Growing up in 80's I watched all the original Exorcist movies as a kid. Exorcist: Legion did a great job holding true to the terror.  You can tell the studio paid attention to the storyline and the graphics. If you want a good horror game for this Halloween. I would highly recommend

Playing teleport and in chapter 3 get trapped like I teleported into an all black object. Can’t move. Can’t bring up inventory.  Cant do anything .  Quit the game is only way out.   

Above was my original review.  I was playing mostly seated and standing when necessary.  This likely caused my black screen.   Now I see there is an official seated mode.  I put back to 4 stars as I enjoyed the game up to that point.  I’ll now have to finish the game in seated mode and will hopefully update to 5 stars. I’m impressed developers actively working, updating and responding to issues. Kudos for that!

developer_response.body: Hey keller999, thank you for updating your review! We're glad the seated mode has improved your experience. Hope you enjoy the rest of the game!

reviews.review_description:
Loved the movies and bought the game on sale a while ago and didn't get around to playing it. Anyway with Halloween around the corner I thought I'd give it ago. 
I wasn't disappointed, the first chapter really set the scene of what to expect. I feel like I may have rushed through the game having just completed the final level. So I am going to go back through it. 
In a nutshell, horror escape rooms, without paying £30 for a one hour session. Recommend volume high and make sure nobody grabs your foot mid game 😁

reviews.review_title: A must play for horror fans
reviews.review_description:
Exorcist Legion VR delivers one of the most chilling and immersive horror experiences ever made for virtual reality. The atmosphere is thick with dread, every creak and whisper makes your pulse race, and the storytelling pulls you deep into a world of demonic possession and faith under fire. Each chapter feels cinematic yet deeply personal, with terrifying realism and haunting sound design that makes you feel like you’re truly standing in the middle of an exorcism. This isn’t just a game—it’s an experience that stays with you long after you take off the headset.

A must-play for horror fans who dare to face true evil.
Wish I never played waisted time down the toilet poo game

reviews.review_title: Creepy and interesting but sadly short
reviews.review_description:
I Love this game since the start of chapter 1! Some good jumpscares and pressing atmosphere! I enjoyed it! Sadly it is pretty short but satisfying! I hope for more Content or a new title.
After this it is time for their second title Twilight zone

reviews.review_title: What a well presented game, seems decent
reviews.review_description:
Whilst I have not had the game for long, first impressions are kinda important, it does certainly impress me. Seated option and all...! Slick and well thought out controls, seems intuitive enough that even I can understand them. Graphically so far, very nice, along with the ambient sounds.

Looking forward to spending longer playing this.

Well done...........................so far :)

developer_response.body: We just added seated mode, and we're glad it meets your needs!   Take your time with the game & drink it in.

reviews.review_description: I had high hopes for this but it doesnt really do a good job at explaining how to play and then I got through the first scenario only to find I didnt get the bonus whatever it was even though it didnt clearly help guide to find it. Then for the second one I found the special item but soon as you get it then you cannot get to your crucifix so then you are stuck. reviews.review_description:
Great Storyline, Awesome Graphics and Very Unexpected "Intelligent Horror Twist"!
Thank You!

developer_response.body: What a review!  Thank you so much for the kind words and thank you for playing.

reviews.review_title: No skills required, pure VR scares!
reviews.review_description: This game is not an action game, it’s like a horror film that a VR game in the sense there’s no real combat or anything like that. It’s basically designed like a movie that you walk through and interact with, but it could be your first VR game and you would get it. This is usually the game I’ll show to the rare people that want to try horror for their first time in VR.
This is the best VR horror game I've ever played！
A great scary game for beginners

developer_response.body: Thank you.  Praise!

reviews.review_description: The Exorcist game is a fun thriller game which is very scary but definitely not suitable for kids xd

reviews.review_description: Bruh I screamed so hard playing this game that it literally made my nan do 153 cartwheels ￼in mid air in and the G Force that was occurring on her wrist and ankles fractured them and then she flopped down at the end of the 50ft staircase and she practically became a human beanbag and then she screamed like she was being literally vaporized into thin air ￼by a A10 warthog ￼

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! We are not liable for the demons escaping the game and possessing your nan to make that occur!

reviews.review_description:
Not for Catholics.

Scared the everliving **** out of me.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! Hope we didn't scare you too bad!

reviews.review_description: If you add multiplayer me and my friends are going to have a really fun time. Also I think is you add multiplayer you are going to get much more sales. And people can agree with me if you add multiplayer we are all going to be happy🙂. Also A VR ghost hunting game would be way better with multiplayer. Hunting ghosts with friends would make everything so much more intense — you’d be freaking out together, coming up with plans on the fly, and probably yelling at each other when something goes wrong. It would feel more real too, since ghost hunting is usually a team effort in real life. Plus, sharing those crazy, scary moments with other people would make the game way more fun and something you’d actually want to come back to again and again. It’s just one of those experiences that’s better when you’re not alone. Also my friends said if they add multiplayer they will buy it.

developer_response.body: Keep an eye out! There's some things in the works...maybe...no guarantees...

reviews.review_title: Games good but needs tidying up
reviews.review_description: 1st off, anyone stuck on chapter 2? It’s not glitched lol. You need to throw holy water on her and when you see the demon body parts come out, use your cross. 2 times on arms and then on the demon face and finished. Ok back to the game. Clunky controls and no idea what to do tbh but if you roll with it you eventually get by. Got stuck on closet door on C3 as it would only open 6 inches 1st so had to restart. Few jump scares but nothing like people are saying tbh. I thought this was going to be really scary but it’s not however I’m only on chapter 4 so may get better. Overall 7/10

developer_response.body:
Hey Glennboy,

In our update today, we've patched the Chapter 2 exorcism. Try to use the salt spray and crucifix, let us know if that fixes your issue!

reviews.review_description:
This game was a Journey. Growing Up Catholic,  This Story Hit Home On So Many Points. I'm 45 Now. But This, This...Made Me Feel Like I was 10 years old again. And Saying My Hail Marys, and The Lord's Prayer Throughout this Playthrough! And Now You're Adding More Chapters!?!? 
Looks like I'm About To Go Back Into The Den Of The Beast Once Again.....BRING IT!  Let's Winchester This In The Butt, Guys!!!

developer_response.body: Thanks for this amazing review!

reviews.review_description:
Very fun game with great graphics. I've finished the 1st chapter and have to get up the nerve to continue! You're playing as a detective investigating some freaky cases complete with your demon fighting kit. Lots to consider on how to use everything but it's really pretty awesome! And very creepy with lots of odd voices and noises to complicate your investigation. Thank you!!
UPDATE: Now finished 4th case. I can only do one at a time as I think they're really creepy! I really like how this game is set up with the different case files. I appreciate the hints too.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for leaving this great review! If you loved the horror aspects of this game, I highly recommend you join the playtesting group for our next game, BlackGate!  It's an asymmetrical multiplayer survival horror game, with a mix of ideas from Dead by Daylight and Among Us. If you're interested, please join our discord! https://discord.gg/TkwWnmVduT

reviews.review_description: This game is awesome. It consists of multiple chapters that each took me hours, I had to take multiple breaks because of how scary this game is. Plus they just added a new chapter, that wraps up the storyline in a very interesting way. If you are ready to be frightened, try this game.

I really enjoyed this… has it all atmosphere, tension, suspense, scares… all with great graphics, sound and gameplay.

This is definitely for 18+ with the blood and gore.

Story is great, I like how the mission select is set in an office environment.
Really cool, how it incorporates it all together.

You start off first mission that seems to act as a tutorial, with finding your tools and it explains how to use them via a book that you find.

The sounds are tense and the flashing lights and effects are cool and add to the atmosphere.

The graphics are really good quality too, shine, reflections and shadows.

There’s a puzzle element to solving some clues which I also like.

Creepy and spooky, but one of them games that gives me that feeling of “one more go”

I highly recommend this game if you like spooky, atmospheric games with puzzle elements.

I have deleted, un-installed, re-installed, restarted quest 3 head set, reset entire game... and it still won't let me go past the demon at the end of level 2!! This is really annoying!!!! The cross vibrates a little, and the chick is moaning, and the demon is talking sh*t, yet nothing happens!!!! I see I'm not the only one with this issue!!! Is is possible that the add on messed some thing up? Can this be fixed?!

developer_response.body:
Hey dragnfly360,

In our update today, we've patched the Chapter 2 exorcism. Try to use the salt spray and crucifix, let us know if that fixes your issue!

reviews.review_description: If you love horror then this is a must-play! From the moment I put on the headset, I was completely immersed in a chilling world filled with eerie sound design, spine-tingling visuals, and a gripping story. The atmosphere is intense, and the interactive elements make you feel like you're truly battling supernatural forces. Plenty of jump scares, and the tension never lets up. Whether it's the unsettling whispers, flickering lights, or sudden demonic encounters, the game keeps you on edge the entire time. The puzzles are well-designed, and the episodic format makes each chapter feel like its own terrifying journey.

developer_response.body: Wow, can we quote you?  Thanks for being part of our journey.    Make sure you check out our new title in development, BlackGate.

reviews.review_title: Game Bug at end of chapter 2
reviews.review_description: My hand won't let go of the cross where she's running towards me down the hall, it won't work either if you hold it towards her. Playing on a meta quest 3S

developer_response.body: You're not supposed to be able to drop the cross at this point in the game. Please reach out to us at exorcist@funtrainvr.com for assistance.

reviews.review_title: I want to rate it higher.
reviews.review_description:
I wish I could rate this higher because it was great until chapter 5. In the tomb where you need to use holy water on the flaming Pazuzu sigil, I can't get my holy water out. I've tried restarting the game multiple times, but it keeps happening. Everything else works fine up to that point. I saw some reviews mentioning problems with Chapter 2. I got through it by dousing her with holy water until the demon showed up, and then I used the cross when the demon left and hit her with holy water again. I had to repeat this about three times before I finally beat Chapter 2.

Edit: I have found a workaround for Chapter 5. Pull up your phone and switch your dominant hand close the phone and now you can finish the game.

Please can someone help. I have 2 problems, at the end of each chapter when I return to the office, I complete the package on the desk, but it doesn't register or update the % completion of the chaper. I am now stuck on chapter 4, the end part with the 2 headed demon. I'm shining my cross at him, and nothing is happening. Just repeatedly throws items. Tried a few times but it's glitching. Help please

developer_response.body:
Hey, we think we know why you were stuck at Chapter 4. When Baal hits you, he regains a great deal of health. We are working on a balance patch to make this less punishing, among other things. 
In addition, the end of chapter items inside the office are not related to completion %.

EDIT: The patch has released today! I hope that helps you out

reviews.review_description: Can’t even get out of the first room just bought it not working

developer_response.body: Hi! Could you please elaborate on the issue you're having? If you want to reach us directly, email us at exorcist@funtrainvr.com

reviews.review_description:
I jumped in a little intrepid, not knowing how I would feel, I like the idea of scary games but playing them is something else.
As I slowly gingerly walked into the church I wondered what lies in wait for me.
Sure enough the music kicks in and I jumped 4 times & only chapter 1.

I can see this getting more and more terrifying, I just have to man up and solve this mystery.
Atmosphere is just incredible and I feel tense playing.
Well done devs & publishers another winner.

developer_response.body: Wow! Loved reading this chilling review! If you enjoyed the atmosphere here, we recommend looking into joining the playtest for our next game, BlackGate! Check us out on social media to learn more!

reviews.review_description: This game is everything you would expect out of an Exorcist game and then some. You hear whispers in your ear and things moving out of your sight. You walk a few steps forward and turn around to find things that weren’t there before or things that are no longer there. It wastes no time placing you right into the mix of intense situations and will have the little hairs on the back of your neck standing up. The developers did a fantastic job with the environments,demonic entities and terrifying set pieces. My only complaint is the controls,they are fairly clunky.Even with the disappointing controls,you will get used to it and I still highly recommend this game for true horror fans. Now I feel like I need to say a prayer & shower in holy water to wash away the horrors I just witnessed lol

The graphics are incredibly detailed, and the sound design is spot on, that is where I found the most tension, with every creak, whisper, and sudden noise keeps you on edge. The lighting and textures make every room feel hauntingly real, and you never know when something is going to pop out at you. If you're a horror enthusiast , Exorcist VR is a must try, just make sure to play with the lights off! Definitely one for your library

OMG... game is so scary.... DOOOOD.... I literally have to take my headset off because im about to pee my pants. .... AND I'M JUST BARELY GETTING BACK INTO THE CATHEDRAL FROM THAT 1ST ROOM WHERE I GOT THE HOLY WATER !!!  ...... BUT iiiiiits Daaaaaark 😱 

I got a looong way to go.. 🫠
Really good vr experience

I have just started playing it and it's terrifying!
It's super immersive and atmospheric. 

I will persevere to finish it!
Highly recommended....

I actually can't play it... it scares me too much!

Quite frustrating. Going around in circles with no explanation. Buggy game play. One second I’m holding my cross next minute it’s gone, then back in the case. Keep having to play the whole level over each time I die? I think I die, not really sure what’s happening. So slow to move around even with speed turned up, teleporting isn’t done like normal games and is slow. Too many annoying things going on to enjoy as hoped.
I want more. The game was so scary, and I loved it every moment, so please make more. I don't know what you can do but please find a way

developer_response.body: Gosh, we LOVE hear this. Stay patient.   If you're into horror, our new space horror game is available for wishlisting, BlackGate

reviews.review_description: This game scared the life outta me! lol but it is so much fun to play I’d recommend this game to those willing to face the pits of Hell.
I'm stuck on chapter 2 because there's a bug and it won't go past the end point. You put the cross to the person strapped to a chair and it's supposed to exercise it and it does nothing

developer_response.body:
Hey halox,

In our update today, we've patched the Chapter 2 exorcism. Try to use the salt spray and crucifix, let us know if that fixes your issue!

reviews.review_description: This is a great game I would really recommend for horror fans and people who like to be scared. It's one of the most terrifying vr games I have ever played
Don’t bother with this game full of bugs !waste of money

developer_response.body: Please reach out to us on Discord, we'd like to know what sort of issues you're encountering.

reviews.review_description:
When in second chapter can't exorcist wome
n  in second padded cell with cross nothing happens
Chapter two has a glitch were you can get past it wasted my money on this game

developer_response.body:
Hey Ogredown,

reviews.review_description: I'll say first it could have done with more scares in between the big scares buut dang that was good.

reviews.review_title: So cool but one thing I want to ask
reviews.review_description: It's super cool and scary but is there any way to activate its subtitles in the game? I'm not a native speaker so it would be much helpful with the subtitles provided.

developer_response.body:
Unfortunately we do not have subtitles implemented.
If you are having difficulty progressing, there is a hint system located on the detectives phone (the lightbulb app on the lower right), that may be able to assist.

reviews.review_description: Very good horror, love this game, but have some glitches that's why 4 start. If glitches and bugs fixed. It's one of the best horror game with 5 star.

I finally made myself try to finish this "game" after owning it forever now and it never really grabbing me after Chapter 2's very interesting premise. You know, finish Chapter 5 for Halloween just to not feel like I wasted $20.
The last chapter is god awful in design... walking around a maze aimlessly for no reason under no threat. It's not scary, fun, nor a good way to spend 20+ minutes..
Worse than that is a section where you have to literally pull yourself on a raft across a long stretch of water..
Scary? No. 
Meaningful to what little narrative is in this "game" in any way?   No..
Most importantly, is it fun? Not.at. all...
Therecwas zero reason for that.

MOST FU***&#G INFURIATING THOUGH....is that I had to do this s**# TWICE!
The first time, I got to the raft section, and my left hand stopped working at all. I could move it, but no items were grabbable with it all of a sudden. So I grab the rope to try pushing on.
Lo and behold, my fuc*** right hand was now doing this! 
So I turned off my Quest 3 and left it for abit...
Tried again, begrudgingly, and it worked fine this time.
I get to the final exorcism (a dull one that again pointlessly takes WAY too long for a experience" game" like this) and after an HOUR in total (thanks to a mandatory 2nd run..), I finish this last dull encounter with me falling down as the demon burns away.
I land, surrounded by a black abyss now and only a small circle of light above me. 
I can move, but no sound, no hands, no item access, can't even bring up a menu...
I sat there for 5 minutes waiting for ANYTHING to happen. Sitting in the dark in hopes that this fu*ffg game didn't just WASTE my precious fuc**f time AGAIN!!

Giving up, I restarted the game in hope of an uto-save blessing me....
Nothing. The game acted as if I hadn't even started chapter 5!

So never again am I wasting any more godd*** time with this buggy fuc*** game that already had next to nothing good in it to begin with!
A game that's been out this long shouldn't STILL have these bugs in them for fu**sake!!
I was looking forward to this game but got stuck at the very beginning because the radio wouldn't work. Yes, I pressed the joystick. Returned.

developer_response.body: You need to click down on the joystick to answer the radio once you have picked it up.

reviews.review_title: Game seems to be broken after update
reviews.review_description: I can’t get past chapter 2 and think it might be a bug related to the latest update.  I get to the end of the chapter, but the demon required to progress and complete chapter 2 never appears.  The game would be great without this bug, but isn’t playable in its current iteration.

developer_response.body: This should be resolved in our latest patch, 4.30! Please update or reinstall the game from your App Library to receive the fix. If you enjoy The Exorcist: Legion, we'd appreciate if you could change your review!

reviews.review_description: Enjoyable game but beware you cannot app share on your device

All the top rating reviews have to be paid.  This game sucks. Movement is horrible, I guess that's why they have to add people in the video.   Very slow movement, loads at every door. A phone is attached to your wrist in game, but you smack the controllers together any time you have to interact with it.

Played on Quest 3, but far too many bugs, for example on the second mission I had no crucifix in my kit, then when I got to the point where I needed to use it, it briefly appeared then drifted though the floor and I was therefore unable to progress.
Nothing will get done about these type of problems though. Could be a fun short little game, but the glitches spoil it completely.

reviews.review_title: Doesn't show up as shareable app!
reviews.review_description: All other apps I've purchased are able to be shared with my children's profiles; however, this one doesn't show up within their library. When they search for it within the shop, it shows it costs money for them to download it. When we click on it as if we are going to buy it, it says it's blocked so we sent a request. I approved it but it's still not showing in their library. It's still showing as if they have to purchase it!! Therefore I'm unstable to share this app!!!

reviews.review_title: Terrible game devs should be fired
reviews.review_description: Your game sucks in every conceivable way
It started off well, was quite impressed  ,then it got stuck on a loading screen..with dust flying around, two arrows pointing forward. I cannot move.  Can the people who made the game help??

I’m not sure what the rest of these people are smoking. This game is terrible. The first chapter at the church is decent, and everything else is actually pathetic. Plus they’re just using the exorcist name to sell this disaster, as it has nothing to do with the movies at all. Don’t waste your money like I did.
Boring game nothing interesting

Wheelchair simulator. Can only move forward or backwards let me move sideways so i can compensate for the janky turn mechanics, maybe support playing while sitting? 

The movement mechanics are the scariest thing ive seen in the game cuz its taking me completely out of the experience i domt care to play this game now i want a refund
